title: First mission to the Yinchorri system
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Mayvitch 7]] |conc= |next=[[Second mission to the Yinchorri system]] |image= |name=First mission to the Yinchorri system |conflict=[[Yinchorri Uprising]] |date=[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] |place=[[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] |result=Yinchorri victory |side1=[[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] |side2=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=*[[Naeshahn]] *[[Ebor Taulk]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2=*1 [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] *2 [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2=Both Jedi |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Unless Naeshahn was aware of this, her first meeting with the Yinchorri could have—''"
"''Ended in disaster, as it did...|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]]|[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]]}} The '''first mission to the Yinchorri system''' occurred in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], during the [[Yinchorri Uprising]]. ==Background== After news of the [[Battle of Mayvitch 7]] reached the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] requested that [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] send a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] team to [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] to negotiate. Without discussing it with the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], Windu sent [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Naeshahn]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Ebor Taulk]]. ==The mission== The two were unaware of the Yinchorri immunity to [[Mind trick/Legends|mind tricks]], use of [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] weaponry, or aggression. The Jedi were [[Death/Legends|killed]], their mutilated bodies later deposited upon Valorum's [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] doorstep. ==Appearances== *[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Primera Misión al sistema Yinchorri }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yinchorri system, first mission to the}} [[Category:Battles in the Yinchorri system]] [[Category:Battles of the Yinchorri Uprising]]
